allow: Bash(cmd /c "gh pr create --title ""feat: implement Spring Boot backend for imobiliaria"" --body ""## Summary\\n\\n- Configura dependencias completas: Spring Security, JJWT 0.12.6, Validation, H2 \(testes\), PostgreSQL\\n- Corrige compose.yaml para expor porta 5432:5432\\n- Configura application.properties \(datasource, JWT, admin, upload\) e perfil de teste com H2\\n- Adiciona enums: TipoImovel, Finalidade, InteresseLead, StatusLead\\n- Adiciona entidades JPA: Corretor, Imovel, Lead\\n- Adiciona repositorios Spring Data JPA com JpaSpecificationExecutor\\n\\n## Test plan\\n\\n- [ ] docker compose up -d inicia PostgreSQL\\n- [ ] ./gradlew compileJava compila sem erros\\n- [ ] ./gradlew test passa com H2\\n- [ ] ./gradlew bootRun sobe a aplicacao\\n\\nGenerated with Claude Code"" 2>&1")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command "cd ''C:\\Projetos\\imobiliaria''; gh pr create --title ''feat: implement Spring Boot backend for imobiliaria'' --body ''Backend Spring Boot 4.0.5 inicial: dependencias, compose.yaml, application.properties, enums, entidades JPA e repositorios.'' 2>&1")
Bash(echo "✅ Para aplicar as mudanças, execute no seu terminal::*)
